title.ko: 솔더링 또는 솔더링 제거; 용접; 솔더링 또는 용접에 의한 클래딩 또는 도금; 국부 가열에 의한 절단, 예. 화염 절단; 레이저 빔에 의한 가공
title.en: SOLDERING OR UNSOLDERING; WELDING; CLADDING OR PLATING BY SOLDERING OR WELDING; CUTTING BY APPLYING HEAT LOCALLY, e.g. FLAME CUTTING; WORKING BY LASER BEAM

definition.ko: 숄더링 B23K1/00, B23K3/00 용접 열발생에 의한 수단에 특징이 있는 것 화염에 의한 것 B23K5/00 전기에 의한 것 B23K9/00, B23K11/00, B23K13/00 플라스마(PLASMA)에 의한 것 B23K10/00 핵미립자에 의한 것 B23K15/00, B23K17/00 테르밋반응에 의한 것 B23K23/00 레이저빔에 의한 것 B23K26/00 기타 B23K25/00, B23K28/00 충격 또는 가압을 특징으로 하는 것 B23K20/00 다른 특색을 특징으로 하는 것; 이 서브클라스의 1개의 특정한 그룹에 구속되지 않는 방법 B23K28/00 국부가열에 의한 절단; 절단분단 B23K7/00, B23K9/00, B23K15/00, B23K26/00, B23K28/00; 11/00 스카아핑(SCARFING), 디서페이싱(DESERFACING) B23K7/00 재료; 보조장치 B23K35/00; 37/00 특수한 방법 B23K31/00, B23K33/00

title.ko: 솔더링, 예. 브레이징, 또는 솔더링 제거 (B23K3/00이 우선)
솔더링, 예. 브레이징, 또는 솔더링 제거 (B23K3/00이 우선)
title.en: Soldering, e.g. brazing, or unsoldering (B23K0003000000 takes precedence)
Soldering by means of induction heating
Soldering by means of radiant energy
Soldering within a furnace (B23K0001012000 takes precedence)
Soldering with the use of hot gas
Unsoldering; Removal of melted solder or other residues
making use of vibrations, e.g. supersonic vibrations
Soldering by means of dipping in molten solder
taking account of the properties of the materials to be soldered

title.ko: 솔더링될 작업물 또는 영역의 예비 처리, 예. 전해 도금에 관한 경우
title.en: Preliminary treatment of work or areas to be soldered, e.g. in respect of a galvanic coating

title.ko: 특정 방법에 특히 적합하지 않은 솔더링, 예. 브레이징, 또는 솔더링 제거용 공구, 장치 또는 특수 부속품
title.en: Tools, devices or special appurtenances for soldering, e.g. brazing, or unsoldering, not specially adapted for particular methods
Solder feeding devices; Solder melting pans
using additional profiled strips or like of welding metal along seam edges
Welding workpieces essentially comprising layers of different metals, e.g. plated workpieces
taking account of the properties of the material to be welded
for purposes other than joining parts, e.g. built-up welding
making use of vibrations, e.g. supersonic vibrations

title.ko: 화염에 의한 절단, 스카아핑(Scarfing) 또는 디서페이싱(Desurfacing)
title.en: Cutting, scarfing, or desurfacing by applying flames
Machines, apparatus, or equipment specially designed for scarfing or desurfacing
by applying additional compounds or means favouring the cutting, scarfing, or desurfacing procedure

title.ko: 보조 장치, 예. 토치의 안내 또는 지지용
title.en: Auxiliary devices, e.g. for guiding or supporting the torch
Arc cutting, gouging, scarfing or desurfacing
Welding by making use of electrode vibrations
with backing means disposed under the seam
Welding for other purposes than joining, e.g. built-up welding
Arrangements or circuits for starting the arc, e.g. by generating ignition voltage, or for stabilising the arc
Arrangements or circuits for magnetic control of the arc
Arrangements or circuits for arc welding with pulsed current or voltage
Monitoring or automatic control of welding parameters
Other electric circuits therefor; Protective circuits; Remote controls

title.ko: 스폿(spot)용접, 이음매 용접 또는 절단을 위하여 전극 또는 가공물의 자동적 공급 또는 이동
title.en: Automatic feeding or moving of electrodes or work for spot or seam welding or cutting

title.ko: 아크 용접 또는 절단 중 가공선 추적 수단
title.en: Means for tracking lines during arc welding or cutting
Means for feeding electrodes, e.g. drums, rolls, motors
taking account of the properties of the materials to be welded
Accessories for electrodes, e.g. ignition tips
Supporting devices adapted for making use of shielding means
Vibrating holders for electrodes (B23K0009022000 takes precedence)
Welding or cutting by means of a plasma

title.ko: 저항 용접 저항 가열에 의한 절단 분리
title.en: Resistance welding; Severing by resistance heating
Seam welding not restricted to one of the preceding subgroups
taking account of the properties of the material to be welded
Electric supply or control circuits therefor

title.ko: 주변 대기의 영향에 대해서 용접 구역의 차폐를 특징으로 하는 것
title.en: characterised by the shielding of the welding zone against influence of the surrounding atmosphere
Electric supply or control circuits therefor
Other welding or cutting; Working by laser beam
within a vacuum chamber (B23K0015040000 takes precedence)
Removing material, e.g. by cutting, by hole drilling
Use of the energy of nuclear particles in welding or related techniques

title.ko: 가열하든가 또는 가열함이 없이, 충격 또는 기타의 압력을 가하는 것에 의한 비전기적 접합, 예. 클래드(clad)법 또는 피금법
title.en: Non-electric welding by applying impact or other pressure, with or without the application of heat, e.g. cladding or plating
by means of a rolling mill
by means of high energy impulses, e.g. magnetic energy
making use of vibrations, e.g. ultrasonic welding
the heat being generated by friction; Friction welding

title.ko: 접합중 기체의 접근을 방지 또는 최소한으로 하는 것, 또는 보호 기체 또는 진공을 이용하는 것(공작편간에 삽입한 재료에 의해 형성된 것 B23K 20/18)
title.en: Preventing or minimising gas access, or using protective gases or vacuum during welding (formed by material interposed between workpieces B23K0020180000)
with interposition of special material to facilitate connection of the parts, e.g. material for absorbing or producing gas
Zonal welding by interposing weld-preventing substances between zones not to be welded
Special methods allowing subsequent separation, e.g. of metals of high quality from scrap material
taking account of the properties of the materials to be welded

title.ko: 슬래그 용접, 즉. 접합되는 재료에 접하는 분말, 슬랙 또는 이와 유사한 가열층 또는 덩어리를 이용한 것
title.en: Slag welding, i.e. using a heated layer or mass of powder, slag or the like in contact with the material to be joined

title.ko: 레이저 빔에 의한 가공, 예. 용접, 절단, 천공(boring)
title.en: Working by laser beam, e.g. welding, cutting or boring

definition.ko: 1. 이 메인 그룹은 다음을 포함합니다. ㆍ 재료 제거 여부에 관계없이 약화 층을 만들기 위한 레이저 가공; ㆍ 레이저 충격 처리; ㆍ 레이저 표면 처리용 장치; ㆍ 레이저 절삭. 2.이 메인 그룹에는 다음이 포함되지 않습니다. ㆍ 서브 클래스 C23C에 포함되는 레이저 보조 증착; ㆍ 금속 분말을 위한 그룹 B22F3/105, 플라스틱을 위한 그룹 B29C67/04, 유리를 위한 그룹 C03B19/06 또는 세라믹을 위한 그룹 C04B35/64로 분류되는 레이저 소결 ㆍ 그룹 C23F1/00의 레이저 보조 화학 에칭.

title.ko: 가공물의 위치 결정 또는 관찰, 예. 조사점에 관한 것; 레이저 빔의 축맞춤, 조준, 초점 맞춤
title.en: Positioning or observing the workpiece, e.g. with respect to the point of impact; Aligning, aiming or focusing the laser beam

title.ko: 레이저 빔의 축맞춤(자동적으로 조정하는 것 B23K 26/042)

title.en: Automatically aligning, aiming or focusing the laser beam, e.g. using the back-scattered light
Shaping the laser beam, e.g. by masks or multi-focusing
by direct control of the laser beam
by means of optical elements, e.g. lenses, mirrors or prisms
Dividing the beam into multiple beams, e.g. multi-focusing
Devices involving relative movement between laser beam and workpiece
Scanning systems, i.e. devices involving movement of the laser beam relative to the laser head
in a special environment or atmosphere, e.g. in an enclosure

title.ko: 유체 흐름을 이용하는 것, 예. 레이저 빔과 함께, 가스 제트를 이용하는 것; 그것을 위한 노즐 (B23K 26/12가 우선)
title.en: using a fluid stream, e.g. a jet of gas, in conjunction with the laser beam; Nozzles therefor (B23K0026120000 takes precedence)
the fluid stream containing particles, e.g. powder
the fluid stream containing a liquid

title.ko: 부산물의 제거, 예. 가공물의 처리 중에 생기는 입자 또는 증기의 제거 (유체 흐름에 의한 것 B23K 26/142)
title.en: Removal of by-products, e.g. particles or vapours produced during treatment of a workpiece (by a fluid stream B23K0026142000)
using absorbing layers on the workpiece, e.g. for marking or protecting purposes
Bonding  (soldering by means of radiant energy B23K0001005000)
with interposition of special material to facilitate connection of the parts
Fillet welding, i.e. involving a weld of substantially triangular cross section joining two parts
taking account of the properties of the material involved

title.ko: . 피복 금속 부분을 포함하는 것 (가공물 상에서 흡수층을 이용하는 것 B23K 26/18)
title.en: involving coated metal parts (using absorbing layers on the workpiece B23K0026180000)
involving parts made of dissimilar metallic material
Laser welding for purposes other than joining

title.ko: 그룹 B23K 5/00-B23K 25/00에 포함되는 용접 또는 절단과 결합하는 것, 예. 저항 용접과 결합하는 것
title.en: in combination with welding or cutting covered by groups B23K0005000000-B23K0025000000, e.g. in combination with resistance welding

title.ko: 아크 가열과 결합된 것, 예. 텅스텐 불활성 가스 [TIG], 금속 불활성 가스 [MIG] 또는 플라즈마 용접
title.en: in combination with arc heating, e.g. tungsten inert gas [TIG], metal inert gas [MIG] or plasma welding
for trimming or tuning of electrical components
by providing a line or line pattern, e.g. a dotted break initiation line

title.ko: 디버링 또는 기계적 손질을 위한 것 (B23K 26/351이 우선)
title.en: for deburring or mechanical trimming (B23K0026351000 takes precedence)
for making a groove or trench, e.g. for scribing a break initiation groove
Trepanning, i.e. boring by moving the beam spot about an axis
taking account of the properties of the material involved
Working by transmitting the laser beam through or within the workpiece
for modifying or reforming the material inside the workpiece, e.g. for producing break initiation cracks
for creating voids inside the workpiece, e.g. for forming flow passages or flow patterns

the laser beam entering a face of the workpiece from which it is transmitted through the workpiece material to work on a different workpiece face, e.g. for effecting removal, fusion splicing, modifying or reforming

title.ko: 그룹 B23K5/00 ~ B23K26/00에 포함되지 않는 용접 또는 절단
title.en: Welding or cutting not covered by groups B23K0005000000-B23K0026000000
Combined welding or cutting procedures or apparatus

title.ko: 특정 물품이나 목적에 특히 적합하나, 메인그룹 B23K1/00 ~ B23K28/00 중 어느 하나에도 포함되지 않는, 이 서브클래스와 관련된 공정
title.en: Processes relevant to this subclass, specially adapted for particular articles or purposes, but not covered by any single one of main groups B23K0001000000-B23K0028000000
relating to investigating the properties, e.g. the weldability, of materials
Specially-profiled edge portions of workpieces for making soldering or welding connections; Filling the seams formed thereby

title.ko: 납땜, 용접 또는 절단을 위하여 사용되는 용접봉, 용접전극, 재료, 매제
title.en: Rods, electrodes, materials, or media, for use in soldering, welding, or cutting

title.ko: 기계적 형상, 예. 형을 특징으로 하는 것
title.en: characterised by mechanical features, e.g. shape

title.ko: 전극으로 사용되기 위하여 특별히 설계된 것
title.en: specially designed for use as electrodes
of non-circular cross-section; with special arrangement, e.g. internal
with more than one layer of coating or sheathing material
not specially designed for use as electrodes

title.ko: 단면이 비원형의 것; 특수한 배치를 갖는 것, 예. 내부 배치를 갖는 것(B23K 35/14가 우선)
title.en: of non-circular cross-section; with special arrangement, e.g. internal (B23K0035140000 takes precedence)
with more than one layer of coating or sheathing material

title.ko: 재료의 조성 또는 성질을 특징으로 하는 것
title.en: characterised by the composition or nature of the material

title.ko: 적절한 솔더링 재료 또는 용접 재료의 선정(B23K 35/34가 우선)
title.en: Selection of soldering or welding materials proper (B23K0035340000 takes precedence)
with the principal constituent melting at less than 400°C
with the principal constituent melting at less than 950°C
with the principal constituent melting at less than 1550°C
with the principal constituent melting at more than 1550°C
comprising compounds which yield metals when heated

title.ko: 비금속 조성물의 선택, 예. 코팅 또는 플럭스 (B23K35/34가 우선) ; 비금속 조성물의 선택과 함께 솔더링 또는 용접 재료의 선택이 모두 관련되는 경우의 선택
title.en: Selection of non-metallic compositions, e.g. coatings or fluxes  (B23K0035340000 takes precedence); Selection of soldering or welding materials, conjoint with selection of non-metallic compositions, both selections being of interest
Selection of compositions of fluxes (B23K0035365000, B23K0035368000 take precedence)
Selection of non-metallic compositions of coating materials either alone or conjoint with selection of soldering or welding materials
Selection of non-metallic compositions of core materials either alone or conjoint with selection of soldering or welding materials
Selection of media, e.g. special atmospheres for surrounding the working area

title.ko: 솔더링 또는 용접을 위한 선재 또는 봉재의 제조
title.en: Making wire or rods for soldering or welding

title.ko: 이 서브클래스의 다른 메인그룹 중 하나에만 포함되는 공정에 특히 적합하지 않은 보조 장치 또는 공정
title.en: Auxiliary devices or processes, not specially adapted for a procedure covered by only one of the other main groups of this subclass
Cooling means for welding or cutting
Safety devices for welding or cutting
Carriages for supporting the welding or cutting element

title.ko: 가공물을 지지 또는 배치하기 위한 것
솔더링, 용접 또는 절단 단계 간의 위치 조정을 위한 가공물의 이동 (B23K37/053이 우선)
title.en: moving work to adjust its position between soldering, welding or cutting steps (B23K0037053000 takes precedence)
aligning cylindrical work; Clamping devices therefor
for positioning the molten material, e.g. confining it to a desired area
Indexing scheme associated with groups B23K0001000000-B23K0031000000, relating to articles made by soldering, welding or cutting or to materials to be soldered, welded or cut.
Articles made by soldering, welding or cutting
Bands or sheets of indefinite length
Nets, wire fabrics or the like
Materials to be soldered, welded or cut
Ferrous alloys and aluminium or alloys thereof
Ferrous alloys and copper or alloys thereof
Ferrous alloys and titanium or alloys thereof
